name: Sweet and Sour Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch scallions, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 large green pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Place the vegetables (except broccoli) in a large pot or wok with 1/2 cup water, garlic, and ginger. Saute for 5 minutes.
3. Add the broccoli and remaining 1/2 cup water to the pot. Stir, then cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
4. Combine the sauce ingredients in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the pineapple chunks and sauce mixture into the vegetables. Cook until thickened.
